data.title: Strangers in Paradise TPB Vol 8-15 17 19 + Singles Lot Terry Moore Abstract
data.description:
Strangers in Paradise is Terry Moore's landmark indie series from Abstract Studio — a character-driven drama that ran from 1993 to 2007 and remains one of the most beloved independent comics ever published. This lot covers a substantial stretch of the run with 10 graphic novel volumes and 11 single issues.

Graphic novels included: Vol. 8, 9, 10, 11, 12, 13, 14, 15, 17, and 19. Singles included: Sourcebook, #44-48, 51, 78-79, and 81. Missing volumes 16 and 18 from the TPB run.

Format | Softcover graphic novel (6.75 x 10.25 in)
Publisher | Abstract Studio
Volumes | 8-15, 17, 19 (10 TPBs)
Singles | Sourcebook, #44-48, 51, 78-79, 81 (11 issues)
Condition | Good, stored flat. All issues bagged and boarded.

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer. Comics are packed securely with cardboard backing to protect against bending in transit.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: 10 softcover graphic novel volumes (Vol. 8-15, 17, 19) plus 11 single issues (Sourcebook, #44-48, 51, 78-79, 81). Missing TPB volumes 16 and 18. All issues individually bagged and boarded. Condition is Good throughout — stored flat, no major spine damage or cover wear noted.
